/-- **The strata ideal localizes along basic opens** (quasi-coherence of
the strata ideal; the `map_ideal_basicOpen` field of the ideal-sheaf
datum).  [Nitsure §4, `n = 0`: the local strata glue by their universal
property.] -/
theorem map_strataIdeal_basicOpen (hcov : ChartsCover G e)
    (U : X.affineOpens) (f₀ : Γ(X, U.1)) :
    (strataIdeal G e U).map
        (X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (X.basicOpen_le f₀)).op).hom =
      strataIdeal G e (X.affineBasicOpen f₀) := by
  haveI := U.2.isLocalization_basicOpen f₀
  refine le_antisymm ?_ ?_
  · -- restriction preserves the chart conditions
    rw [Ideal.map_le_iff_le_comap]
    intro r hr
    rw [Ideal.mem_comap]
    rw [mem_strataIdeal_iff]
    intro W hWD mmW Q
    have hWU : W.1 ≤ U.1 := hWD.trans (X.basicOpen_le f₀)
    have h := (mem_strataIdeal_iff G).mp hr W hWU mmW Q
    rwa [presheaf_res_res (homOfLE (X.basicOpen_le f₀)) (homOfLE hWD)
      (homOfLE hWU)]
  · -- a section satisfying the conditions over the basic open comes from
    -- the strata ideal after clearing a power of `f₀`
    intro r' hr'
    obtain ⟨y, s, hys⟩ := IsLocalization.mk'_surjective
      (Submonoid.powers f₀) r'
    obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := s.2
    have hs : s = ⟨f₀ ^ n, pow_mem (Submonoid.mem_powers f₀) n⟩ :=
      Subtype.ext hn.symm
    subst hs
    -- finitely many charts covering `U`
    obtain ⟨N, Vc, mmc, Pc, hVcU, hcovU⟩ := hcov.exists_finite_charts U
    -- per chart, a power of `f₀` clears the denominator
    have hper : ∀ i : Fin N, ∃ m : ℕ,
        X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (hVcU i)).op (f₀ ^ m * y) ∈
          (Pc i).entryIdeal := by
      intro i
      set fv := X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (hVcU i)).op f₀ with hfv
      haveI := (Vc i).2.isLocalization_basicOpen fv
      have h₁ : X.basicOpen fv ≤ X.basicOpen f₀ := by
        rw [hfv, Scheme.basicOpen_res]
        exact inf_le_right
      -- the strata condition at the chart `D(fv) ≤ D(f₀)`
      have hi := (mem_strataIdeal_iff G).mp hr' (X.affineBasicOpen fv) h₁
        (mmc i) (MatrixPresentationBasicOpen G (Pc i) fv)
      rw [← hys, res_mk'_basicOpen G f₀ (hVcU i) y n h₁,
        entryIdeal_matrixPresentationBasicOpen] at hi
      obtain ⟨t, ht, hmem⟩ :=
        (IsLocalization.mk'_mem_map_algebraMap_iff (Submonoid.powers fv)
          _ _ _ _).mp hi
      obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := ht
      refine ⟨m, ?_⟩
      rw [map_mul, map_pow]
      exact hmem
    choose mc hmc using hper
    set m := Finset.univ.sup mc with hm
    have hmem : ∀ i : Fin N,
        X.presheaf.map (homOfLE (hVcU i)).op (f₀ ^ m * y) ∈
          (Pc i).entryIdeal := by
      intro i
      have hle : mc i ≤ m := Finset.le_sup (Finset.mem_univ i)
      have hsplit : f₀ ^ m * y = f₀ ^ (m - mc i) * (f₀ ^ mc i * y) := by
        rw [← mul_assoc, ← pow_add, Nat.sub_add_cancel hle]
      rw [hsplit, map_mul]
      exact Ideal.mul_mem_left _ _ (hmc i)
    have hfin : f₀ ^ m * y ∈ strataIdeal G e U :=
      mem_strataIdeal_of_charts G _ Vc hVcU mmc Pc hmem hcovU
    have := (IsLocalization.mk'_mem_map_algebraMap_iff (Submonoid.powers f₀)
      Γ(X, X.basicOpen f₀) (strataIdeal G e U) y
      (⟨f₀ ^ n, pow_mem (Submonoid.mem_powers f₀) n⟩ :
        Submonoid.powers f₀)).mpr
      ⟨f₀ ^ m, pow_mem (Submonoid.mem_powers f₀) m, hfin⟩
    rw [hys] at this
    exact this

/-! ## §6 The rank stratum as a closed subscheme -/

variable (e) in
/-- The rank-`e` **strata ideal sheaf datum** [Nitsure §4, `n = 0`: the
canonical scheme structure on the rank-`e` stratum]. -/
noncomputable def strataData (hcov : ChartsCover G e) : X.IdealSheafData where
  ideal := strataIdeal G e
  map_ideal_basicOpen U f₀ := map_strataIdeal_basicOpen G hcov U f₀

@[simp] lemma strataData_ideal (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (U : X.affineOpens) :
    (strataData G e hcov).ideal U = strataIdeal G e U := rfl

variable (e) in
/-- The **rank-`e` stratum** of a quasi-coherent module `G`: the closed
subscheme of `X` cut out by the entry ideals of local `e`-generator
presentations. -/
noncomputable def stratum (hcov : ChartsCover G e) : Scheme.{u} :=
  (strataData G e hcov).subscheme

variable (e) in
/-- The closed immersion of the rank-`e` stratum. -/
noncomputable def stratumι (hcov : ChartsCover G e) :
    stratum G e hcov ⟶ X :=
  (strataData G e hcov).subschemeι

instance (hcov : ChartsCover G e) :
    IsClosedImmersion (stratumι G e hcov) :=
  inferInstanceAs (IsClosedImmersion (strataData G e hcov).subschemeι)

/-- **The support of the rank-`e` stratum is the rank-`e` locus**: a point
lies in the image of the stratum iff the fiber of `G` there has dimension
exactly `e` [Nitsure §4, part (i), `n = 0` case]. -/
theorem mem_range_stratumι_iff (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (x : X) :
    x ∈ Set.range (stratumι G e hcov) ↔ pointRank X G x = e := by
  rw [stratumι, Scheme.IdealSheafData.range_subschemeι]
  obtain ⟨V, hxV, hchart⟩ := hcov x
  obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hchart
  rw [show (x ∈ ((strataData G e hcov).support : Set X)) ↔
      x ∈ (strataData G e hcov).support from Iff.rfl,
    Scheme.IdealSheafData.mem_support_iff_of_mem (U := V) hxV,
    strataData_ideal]
  rw [show strataIdeal G e V = P.entryIdeal from
    strataIdeal_eq_entryIdeal G P]
  rw [V.2.mem_zeroLocus_iff_le_primeIdealOf P.entryIdeal ⟨x, hxV⟩,
    P.entryIdeal_le_prime_iff, pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank G x hxV]
  exact Iff.rfl

end Scheme.Modules

end AlgebraicGeometry

/-- **The support of the rank-`e` stratum is the rank-`e` locus**: a point
lies in the image of the stratum iff the fiber of `G` there has dimension
exactly `e` [Nitsure §4, part (i), `n = 0` case]. -/
theorem mem_range_stratumι_iff (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (x : X) :
    x ∈ Set.range (stratumι G e hcov) ↔ pointRank X G x = e := by
  rw [stratumι, Scheme.IdealSheafData.range_subschemeι]
  obtain ⟨V, hxV, hchart⟩ := hcov x
  obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hchart
  rw [show (x ∈ ((strataData G e hcov).support : Set X)) ↔
      x ∈ (strataData G e hcov).support from Iff.rfl,
    Scheme.IdealSheafData.mem_support_iff_of_mem (U := V) hxV,
    strataData_ideal]
  rw [show strataIdeal G e V = P.entryIdeal from
    strataIdeal_eq_entryIdeal G P]
  rw [V.2.mem_zeroLocus_iff_le_primeIdealOf P.entryIdeal ⟨x, hxV⟩,
    P.entryIdeal_le_prime_iff, pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank G x hxV]
  exact Iff.rfl
input.new_string:
/-- **The support of the rank-`e` stratum is the rank-`e` locus**: a point
lies in the image of the stratum iff the fiber of `G` there has dimension
exactly `e` [Nitsure §4, part (i), `n = 0` case]. -/
theorem mem_range_stratumι_iff (hcov : ChartsCover G e) (x : X) :
    x ∈ Set.range (stratumι G e hcov) ↔ pointRank X G x = e := by
  obtain ⟨V, hxV, hchart⟩ := hcov x
  obtain ⟨mm, ⟨P⟩⟩ := hchart
  have h0 : x ∈ Set.range (stratumι G e hcov) ↔
      x ∈ (strataData G e hcov).support := by
    show x ∈ Set.range ((strataData G e hcov).subschemeι) ↔ _
    rw [Scheme.IdealSheafData.range_subschemeι]
    exact Iff.rfl
  have h1 : x ∈ (strataData G e hcov).support ↔
      x ∈ X.zeroLocus (U := V.1)
        (((strataData G e hcov).ideal V : Ideal Γ(X, V.1)) :
          Set Γ(X, V.1)) :=
    Scheme.IdealSheafData.mem_support_iff_of_mem hxV
  have hIP : ((strataData G e hcov).ideal V : Ideal Γ(X, V.1)) =
      P.entryIdeal := strataIdeal_eq_entryIdeal G P
  have h2 : x ∈ X.zeroLocus (U := V.1)
      (((strataData G e hcov).ideal V : Ideal Γ(X, V.1)) : Set Γ(X, V.1)) ↔
      P.entryIdeal ≤ (V.2.primeIdealOf ⟨x, hxV⟩).asIdeal := by
    rw [hIP]
    exact V.2.mem_zeroLocus_iff_le_primeIdealOf P.entryIdeal ⟨x, hxV⟩
  have h3 : P.entryIdeal ≤ (V.2.primeIdealOf ⟨x, hxV⟩).asIdeal ↔
      pointRank X G x = e := by
    rw [P.entryIdeal_le_prime_iff, pointRank_eq_chartFiberRank G x hxV]
    exact Iff.rfl
  exact ((h0.trans h1).trans h2).trans h3

---
name: t12-rank-stratum-landed
description: Rank-e stratum closed subscheme LANDED sorry-free (EntryIdealStratum.lean, run 0010 T12); remaining route to flatLocusStratification_universal + the congrArg/Eq.mp anti-motive recipe.
metadata:

---

**The canonical rank-`e` stratum exists in Lean (2026-07-05, run 0010 T12): `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/EntryIdealStratum.lean`, 806 LOC, sorry-free, axiom-clean `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, full `lake build` green (8584 jobs).**

Contents (all in namespaces `Module.MatrixPresentation` / `Ideal` / `AlgebraicGeometry(.Scheme.Modules)`):
- §1 `MatrixPresentation.congr` (equiv transport, relMatrix/entryIdeal preserved `rfl`), `fiberRank_le`, `Ideal.fiberRank_congr(_ideal)`, **`Ideal.fiberRank_baseChange`** (no flatness: `q.fiberRank (A ⊗[R] M) = (q.comap …).fiberRank M`, via κ(p)→κ(q) = `Ideal.ResidueField.map` + double `cancelBaseChange` + `finrank_baseChange`), `fiberRank_of_isLocalizedModule`.
- §2 dictionary: `IsAffineOpen.mem_zeroLocus_iff_le_primeIdealOf`, `mem_basicOpen_iff_notMem_primeIdealOf` (via `fromSpec_image_zeroLocus`/`fromSpec_preimage_basicOpen`; never rw the point — walls).
- §3 `IsPresentationChart`, `MatrixPresentationBasicOpen` (localize a presentation to a basic open via `isLocalizedModule_basicOpen` + `baseChange`+`congr`), `chartFiberRank` + **chart-independence** (`chartFiberRank_eq`, via `exists_basicOpen_le_affine_inter` + `comap_primeIdealOf_appLE` at `𝟙 X`), `pointRank`.
- §4 `presheaf_res_res` (thin-cat collapse), `transportOpens` (`h ▸ P` + `entryIdeal_transportOpens` by `subst`), `mem_entryIdeal_of_locally` (basic-cover locality via `mem_of_span_eq_top_of_smul_pow_mem`), `exists_basicOpen_mem_entryIdeal_of_chart` (chart-to-chart transfer through `entryIdeal_eq` at a common simultaneous basic open).
- §5 `strataIdeal` (⨅ over charts of comaps), evaluation `strataIdeal_eq_entryIdeal`, `mem_strataIdeal_of_charts`, `ChartsCover` + `exists_finite_charts` (affine compactness, NO noetherian needed), `res_mk'_basicOpen`, **`map_strataIdeal_basicOpen`** (quasi-coherence: mk'-surjective + per-chart denominator clearing + `Finset.univ.sup`).
- §6 `strataData : X.IdealSheafData`, `stratum`, `stratumι` (`IsClosedImmersion` free from Mathlib for ANY subschemeι), `mem_range_stratumι_iff` (support = rank-e locus via `entryIdeal_le_prime_iff`).

**Remaining route to `flatLocusStratification_universal` (GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean:2045), est. 2 sessions:**
1. (D1) `strataData ≤ q.ker` for `q : T ⟶ X` with flat pullback of constant rank e: per affine `V ⊆ q⁻¹(chart)`, `pullback_app_isoTensor` (QuotScheme, public, general g) + `baseChange`+`congr` presentation + `relMatrix_eq_zero_of_flat` (rank hypothesis via `rankAtStalk_eq` [Mathlib, flat+finite] + `fiberRank_baseChange` + `comap_primeIdealOf_appLE`); then `IsClosedImmersion.lift` (condition `f.ker ≤ g.ker`, `ker_subschemeι : subschemeι.ker = I`, `le_ofIdeals_iff` reduces to per-affine `RingHom.ker`). Zero-detection on a cover for the ker condition: sections sheaf-separatedness.
2. (D2) `CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 stratum) (pullback stratumι G)`: `flat_section_of_affine_cover` (GenericFlatnessGeometric) over `subschemeCover` preimages of charts; sections = base change to `Γ/I` (section formula along `stratumι`), relMatrix ↦ 0 in the quotient by construction ⟹ `free_of_relMatrix_eq_zero`.
3. (E) clopen rank decomposition of T (`isLocallyConstant_rankAtStalk` [Mathlib] + dictionary), `Sigma` assembly (`nonempty_isColimit_cofanMk_of` for disjoint open covers, `disjoint_opensRange_sigmaι`, `Scheme.hom_ext_of_forall`, `isInitialOfIsEmpty` for empty overlaps), instantiate X := ↑W_e (`W_e := ⋃` charts; `affineOpensRestrict`, appIso transport; `pullback_isQuasicoherent_hom` for the restricted module), rank bound for finiteness (`fiberRank_le` + finite cover of noetherian S).

---
name: v431-instance-wall-recipes-r2
description: Round-2 v4.31 instance-wall recipes from the T12 stratum build — congrArg+Eq.mp beats rw/▸ on mk'-terms; canonical OreLocalization base algebra; never letI toAlgebra-comp for residue fields.
metadata:
  type: reference
---

**v4.31 wall recipes discovered in the EntryIdealStratum build (run 0010 T12, complements [[t12-rank-stratum-landed]] and I-0092/I-0088):**

- **`congrArg (fun z => z ∈ E) h |>.mp` beats both `rw … at` and `▸` on `IsLocalization.mk'`-shaped terms.** `rw` fails with "target not type-correct under instances transparency" even when patterns print identically (the mk' instance args differ as terms: context `haveI` fvar vs statement-`haveI` term); `▸` hits deterministic whnf timeouts even at 1.6M heartbeats (motive search normalizes mk' into OreLocalization guts). Explicit `congrArg` with the membership function given, then `Eq.mp`, is instant — no motive search, kernel-cheap cast. Same trick for rewriting the ideal: `congrArg (fun I => z ∈ I) hE |>.mp`.
- **`set fv := <section term> with hfv` is poison when `fv` occurs in localization TYPES** (`Γ(X, X.basicOpen fv)`, `IsLocalization.Away fv …`) — re-confirmed I-0092; write the term explicitly everywhere instead.
- **Never `letI : Algebra R κ(q) := (comp …).toAlgebra`** — Mathlib has canonical instances all the way: `OreLocalization/Ring.lean:112` gives `Algebra R₀ R[S⁻¹]`, quotients inherit, so `Algebra R q.ResidueField` + `IsScalarTower R A q.ResidueField` are ALREADY instances; a manual letI creates a diamond that kills `IsScalarTower R κ κ` synthesis. The only letI needed for residue-field towers is `Algebra p.ResidueField q.ResidueField := (Ideal.ResidueField.map p q f rfl).toAlgebra` (no canonical competitor), with the tower proved by `of_algebraMap_eq` + `ResidueField.map_algebraMap`.
- **Dictionary lemmas**: don't `rw` points into/out of `fromSpec`-form inside Iff goals mentioning `Γ(X,U)`-typed sets (motive wall). Route through `fromSpec_image_zeroLocus` / `fromSpec_preimage_basicOpen` with set-level rewrites and `Function.Injective hU.fromSpec := hU.fromSpec.isOpenEmbedding.injective`.
- **Mathlib gems confirmed present in v4.31** (no need to re-scout): `IsAffineOpen.comap_primeIdealOf_appLE` (full point-prime naturality along any morphism), unconditional `IsClosedImmersion I.subschemeι`, `IsClosedImmersion.lift`/`lift_fac` (ker condition), `Scheme.Hom.ker_apply` under `[QuasiCompact]`, `Module.rankAtStalk_eq`/`rankAtStalk_baseChange`/`isLocallyConstant_rankAtStalk` (flat+fp), `IsLocalization.mk'_mem_map_algebraMap_iff`/`algebraMap_mem_map_algebraMap_iff`, `Submodule.mem_of_span_eq_top_of_smul_pow_mem`, `exists_basicOpen_le_affine_inter`, `iSup_basicOpen_eq_self_iff`, `nonempty_isColimit_cofanMk_of` (disjoint-open cofan colimit), `Scheme.hom_ext_of_forall`.
- `mk'_surjective` is a `Function.Surjective` over pairs — destructure `⟨⟨y, s⟩, hys⟩` then `dsimp only at hys` to beta-reduce the match, else later rewrites fail.

text:
## Summary

Chose T12's documented frontier — the geometric layer for `flatLocusStratification_universal` (the `FlatteningStratification` cone's last sorry) — and landed its core: a new 806-line file `EntryIdealStratum.lean` that constructs **the canonical rank-`e` stratum as a closed subscheme**, sorry-free and axiom-clean, with full `lake build` green (8584 jobs). The credit block from I-0099 is over (this session ran normally). Interface scouting ran as a 6-agent workflow (132 findings) and uncovered decisive Mathlib shortcuts (`comap_primeIdealOf_appLE`, unconditional `IsClosedImmersion subschemeι`, `rankAtStalk_eq`), which let the whole construction avoid noetherian hypotheses and heterogeneous transports.

## Progress
- AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/EntryIdealStratum.lean: NEW, 806 LOC, 0 sorries; §1 fiberRank base-change invariance (no flatness), §2 point↔prime dictionary, §3 presentation charts + chart-independent `pointRank`, §4 entry-ideal locality + chart-to-chart transfer, §5 `strataIdeal` + evaluation + quasi-coherence field, §6 `strataData`/`stratum`/`stratumι` + support = rank-e locus.
- AlgebraicJacobian.lean: registered the new module; `#print axioms` on 6 key decls: exactly `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.
- AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/GenericFlatnessGeometric.lean: no change; `flatLocusStratification_universal` keeps its 1 deliberate sorry, now consumable next session.
- Ledger: 3 commits (b90ff8e19a, 26ac8c7f60, fbd9636441); inbox I-0100 filed; 2 memory files written (route + wall recipes).

## Issues
- Blueprint debt: ~25 new Lean decls have no blueprint nodes yet (new subsection of `Picard_FlatteningStratification.tex` needed) — flagged in I-0100.
- Two benign linter warnings remain (unused `∃`-binder name `Pc`).
- Notable walls solved: `rw`/`▸` fail on `mk'`-shaped terms (instance-arg mismatch, whnf timeouts) — the working recipe is explicit `congrArg`+`Eq.mp`; manual `letI toAlgebra`-comp for residue fields creates diamonds (canonical OreLocalization instances exist) — both recorded in memory.

## Why I stopped
Task not complete: the universal theorem itself (Stage D/E — factorization via `IsClosedImmersion.lift`, stratum flatness, clopen rank decomposition, `Sigma` assembly, `W_e` instantiation) remains; session budget was exhausted after Stage C's kernel verification and wrap-up.

## Next
- D1: `strataData ≤ q.ker` for flat constant-rank pullbacks via `relMatrix_eq_zero_of_flat` on `pullback_app_isoTensor`-transported presentations.
- D2: `CoherentSheafFlat (𝟙 stratum)` via `flat_section_of_affine_cover` over `subschemeCover`.
- E: clopen rank decomposition + `nonempty_isColimit_cofanMk_of` assembly + instantiate at `↑W_e`; close `flatLocusStratification_universal`.
- Blueprint pass for EntryIdealStratum.lean. Full route with exact lemma names in memory `t12-rank-stratum-landed`.
